creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
This patch updates our py-snmp4 suite to latest versions, including:

  - net-mgmt/py-snmp4 to 4.1.16a
  - net-mgmt/py-snmp4-apps to 0.2.11a
  - net-mgmt/py-snmp4-mibs to 0.0.8a

This update should be atomic so i submit it in single patch against ports/net-mgmt. The common changes to this ports:

  - add CHEESESHOP mirror, make it default
  - install LICENSE via license framework
  - switch to setuptools
  - respect NOPORTEXAMPLES

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
